# CareCalculus

> Free, multilingual (English, French, Arabic) clinical calculators, medical scores, and dosage tools for nurses, ICU specialists, emergency physicians, and healthcare students. Every formula is evidence-based and aligned with peer-reviewed guidelines (AHA, ESC, CDC, ARDSNet, Cockcroft-Gault, Devine). All tools are free and run instantly in the browser.

CareCalculus eliminates cognitive load in high-stress clinical settings by providing instantaneous, error-free calculations. Results are computed live as values are entered. Pages are available in three languages: English (carecalculus.com/), French (carecalculus.com/fr/), and Arabic (carecalculus.com/ar/).

## Emergency & Critical Care calculators

- [Mean Arterial Pressure (MAP) Calculator](https://carecalculus.com/map-calculator): Computes MAP from systolic and diastolic blood pressure to assess organ perfusion in hypotension and sepsis.
- [Glasgow Coma Scale (GCS)](https://carecalculus.com/glasgow-coma-scale): Scores eye, verbal, and motor response to grade level of consciousness in traumatic brain injury.
- [qSOFA Score](https://carecalculus.com/qsofa-score): Rapid bedside sepsis risk screen (respiratory rate, mental status, systolic BP).
- [SIRS Criteria](https://carecalculus.com/sirs-criteria): Systemic Inflammatory Response Syndrome assessment for sepsis triage.
- [CURB-65 Score](https://carecalculus.com/curb65-score): Pneumonia severity and mortality risk stratification.
- [P/F Ratio (PaO2/FiO2)](https://carecalculus.com/pf-ratio): Oxygenation index for ARDS and acute lung injury severity.
- [Tidal Volume (ARDSNet)](https://carecalculus.com/tidal-volume): Lung-protective ventilation tidal volume from ideal body weight.

## Organ Function & Internal Medicine

- [Creatinine Clearance (Cockcroft-Gault)](https://carecalculus.com/creatinine-clearance): Estimates renal function for drug dosing.
- [MELD Score](https://carecalculus.com/meld-score): Model for End-Stage Liver Disease mortality estimate.
- [Wells Score (DVT/PE)](https://carecalculus.com/wells-score): Pretest probability for deep vein thrombosis and pulmonary embolism.
- [CHA2DS2-VASc Score](https://carecalculus.com/cha2ds2-vasc): Stroke risk in atrial fibrillation to guide anticoagulation.
- [Corrected Calcium](https://carecalculus.com/corrected-calcium): Albumin-corrected serum calcium.
- [Absolute Neutrophil Count (ANC)](https://carecalculus.com/anc-calculator): Neutropenia assessment from white cell differential.

## Dosing, Metrics & Pharmacology

- [IV Drip Rate Calculator](https://carecalculus.com/drip-rate-calculator): Infusion drops-per-minute and flow rate.
- [Corticosteroid Conversion](https://carecalculus.com/steroid-conversion): Equivalent dosing across steroid agents.
- [Ideal & Adjusted Body Weight](https://carecalculus.com/adjusted-body-weight): Devine-formula IBW and ABW for pharmacokinetics.
- [Medical Unit Conversions](https://carecalculus.com/medical-conversions): Laboratory and clinical unit converter.
- [Body Mass Index (BMI)](https://carecalculus.com/bmi-calculator): Weight-status classification.
- [PHQ-9 Depression Screener](https://carecalculus.com/phq9-score): Patient Health Questionnaire depression severity.

## Resources

- [Medical Journals Library](https://carecalculus.com/blog): Evidence-based, peer-reviewed clinical literature.
- [Clinical Blog](https://carecalculus.com/blog-articles): Clinical tips, news, and editorials.
- [Presentations](https://carecalculus.com/presentations): Medical presentation decks (PPTX).
- [Courses](https://carecalculus.com/cours): Accredited clinical course material (PDF).

## Notes

- All calculators are free, require no login, and work offline after first load.
- French versions are under /fr/ and Arabic versions under /ar/ with full hreflang alternates.
- Sitemap: https://carecalculus.com/sitemap.xml

## Faculté de Médecine et de Pharmacie (FMPC) — Academic Course Library

CareCalculus hosts a free academic library of 45 official course modules from
the Faculty of Medicine and Pharmacy of Casablanca (FMPC / FMP Casablanca),
part of Université Hassan II. Modules are ranked by online search popularity
and cover all 5 years (10 semesters) of the Moroccan medical curriculum.
PDFs are embeddable and downloadable directly in the browser.

- [FMPC Module Library (index)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine)
- [Pharmacologie générale (#1)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/pharmacologie-generale)
- [Urgences et Réanimation – Douleurs et Soins palliatifs (#2)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/urgences-et-reanimation-douleurs-et-soins-palliatifs)
- [Pathologie cardiovasculaire (#3)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/pathologie-cardiovasculaire)
- [Maladies du système nerveux (#4)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/maladies-du-systeme-nerveux)
- [Gynécologie-Obstétrique (#5)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/gynecologie-obstetrique)
- [Maladies de l'enfant (#6)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/maladies-de-lenfant)
- [Hématologie – Cancérologie (#7)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/hematologie-cancerologie)
- [Pathologie respiratoire (#8)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/pathologie-respiratoire)
- [Santé Mentale (#9)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/sante-mentale)
- [Glandes endocrines – Peau (#10)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/glandes-endocrines-peau)
- [Appareil locomoteur (#11)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/appareil-locomoteur)
- [Immunopathologie (#12)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/immunopathologie)
- [Parasitologie-Mycologie & Maladies Infectieuses (#13)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/parasitologie-mycologie-maladies-infectieuses)
- [Pathologie de l'appareil digestif (#14)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/pathologie-de-lappareil-digestif)
- [Néphrologie-Urologie (#15)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/nephrologie-urologie)
- [OTO-RHINO-LARYNGOLOGIE / OPHTALMOLOGIE (#16)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/oto-rhino-laryngologie-ophtalmologie)
- [Raisonnement Clinique & Synthèse Thérapeutique (#17)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/raisonnement-clinique-synthese-therapeutique)
- [Anatomie pathologique générale (#18)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/anatomie-pathologique-generale)
- [Anatomie Pathologique spéciale (#19)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/anatomie-pathologique-speciale)
- [Imagerie médicale (#20)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/imagerie-medicale)
- [Bactériologie – Virologie – Immunologie (#21)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/bacteriologie-virologie-immunologie)
- [Physiologie I (#22)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/physiologie-i)
- [Physiologie II (#23)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/physiologie-ii)
- [Anatomie I (#24)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/anatomie-i)
- [Anatomie II (#25)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/anatomie-ii)
- [Anatomie III (#26)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/anatomie-iii)
- [Anatomie IV (#27)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/anatomie-iv)
- [Biochimie-Chimie (#28)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/biochimie-chimie)
- [Biochimie clinique (#29)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/biochimie-clinique)
- [Sémiologie I (#30)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/semiologie-i)
- [Sémiologie II (#31)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/semiologie-ii)
- [Hématologie fondamentale (#32)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/hematologie-fondamentale)
- [Médecine légale et médecine du travail – Éthique et Déontologie (#33)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/medecine-legale-et-medecine-du-travail-ethique-et-deontologie)
- [Histologie – Embryologie I (#34)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/histologie-embryologie-i)
- [Histologie – Embryologie II (#35)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/histologie-embryologie-ii)
- [Biologie et génétique fondamentale (#36)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/biologie-et-genetique-fondamentale)
- [Biophysique (#37)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/biophysique)
- [Médecine Sociale, Santé Publique et Économie de la Santé (#38)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/medecine-sociale-sante-publique-et-economie-de-la-sante)
- [Santé publique (#39)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/sante-publique)
- [Secourisme et médecine expérimentale (#40)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/secourisme-et-medecine-experimentale)
- [Histoire de la Médecine et psycho-sociologie (#41)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/histoire-de-la-medecine-et-psycho-sociologie)
- [Communication et langues (#42)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/communication-et-langues)
- [Méthodes d'apprentissage et terminologie (#43)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/methodes-dapprentissage-et-terminologie)
- [Techniques de communication (#44)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/techniques-de-communication)
- [Stage d'immersion (1ère et 2ème année) (#45)](https://carecalculus.com/fmp-medecine/stage-dimmersion-1ere-et-2eme-annee)
